title: andropogon minutissimus
intro: Andropogon minutissimus, commonly known as the Dwarf Grass or Small Bluestem, is a perennial grass native to North America. Its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Andropogon minutissimus include soothing skin irritations, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory problems such as coughs and bronchitis. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
